package rulefixtures

// scenario for empty_interface_parameter_overuse: exported functions with `any` or `interface{}` parameters when concrete types would suffice
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule478NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario478Negative(records []Rule478NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
